title: rafinesquia coccinea
intro: Rafinesquia coccinea, also known as Scarlet Puccoon, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, as well as acting as a natural dye and skin toner. Herbal preparations of Rafinesquia coccinea include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be made from the plant's roots, leaves, and flowers.
